titleStmt.title: SII 36.243: original edition by P Shanmugam
No. 243. (A.R. No. 243 of 1910.) NARASIṄGAPURAM, TIRUVALLORE TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. On the north wall of the central shrine in the Narasimha Perumāḷ temple.

summary.p: (Śaka 1530, Sowmya, Mēsham, śu., 12, Pūram = A.D. 1609, April, 15, Wednesday.).

Damaged and incomplete. Mentions the sīrmai of Gōburi Obarāja. Seems to register a grant of 65 veṇkaṭarāyan varāgaṉ for the supply of sacred food during the specified 14 festival days in a year in the temple of Swāmi Aḻagiyasiṅgar at Kūvam also known as Tyāgasamudranallūr.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī rājādhirājaparameśvara śrī vīrapratāpa śrī vīra veṅkaṭapatideva mahārāyar pradhivirājyam paṇṇiaṟuḷāṉiṉṟa śakābdam [1000 5 100 3 10]l mel cellāniṉṟa saumya samvatsarattu meṣa nāyaṟṟu pūrvvapakṣattu pañcamiyum pūca nakṣatramum peṟṟa vārattuṉāḷ dvādaśi puṇyakālattile jeyaṅkoṇṭacoḻa toṇṭa maṇṭalattu cantirakiri rājyattu teṉkarai maṇaviṟk koṭṭattil kaṇuṟūr ṉāṭṭilk kūvvamāṉa tiyākasamudra nallūrāṉa pratiṉāmamāṉa śrī narasimhapurattu svāmi Aḻakiya ciṅkar cannatiyile statalattil jīyamuttirai perumāḷ dāsamudrai stāṉattār śrī vaiṣṇavarkaḷ kūvva Ūravar Ūṟkaṇakkappiḷḷai mutalāṉa stalattil Aṉaivar cammatiyi
lum gobūri Obarājāviṉ cīrmai pūṇṭi timmavaramāṉa Aṅkaḷam ma naraciṅka mutal paṭṭaṇasvāmi tillai tirukkacci nampi ninṟaippaṭit tīrtta kaṭṭaḷai ninṟait tiruviḷakkuk kaṭṭaḷaikkum ttiṅkaḷ tivacam va tivacattukkum maṭattirk kaṭṭaḷai rokkam poli viṭṭu sāstayam paṇṇi Aḻakiya ciṅkarruti vimāṉattil jagatippaṭaiyil śilāśāsana vācakappaṭi tiṉappaṭittaram ṉāḷ Oṇṇukku Amutupaṭi kuṟuṇi Āka varuṣam Oṇṇuṉāḷ 3 100 6 10 5kku Amutupaṭi 3 100 tanumāsat tirunakṣatra Oṇṇukku tocaippaṭikku Amutupaṭi kuṟuṇi Uḷuntu ṉāḻi Eṇṇai Uḻakku
poṅkalt taḷikai Oṇṇukku Amutupaṭi kuṟuṇi payaṟu Irunāḻi tuvarait tiruppaṇiyāram kuṟuṇi vellam palam pattu pākku ṉūṟu cantaṇap palam Oṇṇukkumt tiṅkaḷ tivaca viśeṣappaṭikku Amutupaṭi kalane mukkuṟuṇi māsa tirukkacci nampi tiruvīti Eḻuntaruḷa tiruvītipantam Eṭṭu ninṟait tiruviḷakku pakal viḷakku Oṇṇu rā viḷakku Iraṇṭu maṇṭapa viḷakku cāttuk kāppu Eṇṇai Uḻakku Ippaṭi Ellām varuṣam Oṇṇukku tirunakṣatram patiṉālukku viceṣa tivacaṅkaḷukkum svāmi Aḻakiyaciṅkar śrīpaṇṭārattile naṭakkiṟattukkup palavūr nakarattārum svāmi Aḻakiyaciṅkar śrīpaṇṭārattukku rokkam poliviṭṭukku sam
maticcu vācipaṭāta veṅkaṭarāyan varākaṉ 6 10 5 Inta varākaṉ Aṟupattañcukkum vaṭṭikkuc cilavāka Inta māsat tirunakṣatrampaṭi patinālum tiṉappaṭitramum śrī paṇṭārattile Ācantirākkatstāyi Āka naṭattakkaṭaivarākavum Ittarma Ivar pErāl viṭṭOm tiṉappaṭittaram viṭṭavaṉ viḻukkāṭu ṉālattoṉṟum poliviṭṭukkārarukku kuṭuttu dharmma veccattukku ṉāḻiṭai kuṉṉam Aññāḻi paṭi caṉṉati viḻukkāṭile peṟṟuvarakkaṭaivarākavum tirunakṣatrat paṭi viṭṭavaṉ viḻukkāṭu ṉaṭattikāṟatu śrīvaiṣṇavarkaḷ mutal niṉṟu tiruvolakkattile viṉiyogam paṇṇivikkakaṭaivārākavum tirukkoṭalttiruṉāḷ tiruvadontatiruṉāḷ mahānava
mi piḷḷai Uttāṇṭi Eḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 36.243 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
